items.title: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM) Rides 70% Stock Surge Amid Strong Commercial and Defense Demand
items.description: We recently compiled a list of the 12 Best Stocks to Own for Grandchildren. Howmet Aerospace Inc. is one of them. Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM), a leading manufacturer of engineered metal products for aircraft engines, airframes, defense systems, and industrial markets, continues to benefit from strong demand across both commercial and defense aerospace sectors. items.title: Boeing developing new single-aisle plane to replace 737 Max aircraft: report
items.description: Boeing is reportedly working on a new narrow-body aircraft to replace its best-selling 737 Max, which has faced a series of safety and quality issues.

items.title: Boeing Is Reportedly Working on 737 Max Successor. Here’s Why That Matters.
items.description: Boeing has reportedly started working on a next-generation single-aisle aircraft that could eventually succeed the 737 Max, as the plane maker looks to regain business lost to rival Airbus after a spate of quality problems in recent years.
